text:
Once upon a time, there was a clumsy rabbit named Bertha. She loved chasing butterflies but always ended up falling backward. One sunny morning, Bertha decided she’d had enough. She packed some nuts and headed deep into the woods.

There, she found an old oak tree. It had dark leaves and gnarled branches. Bertha sat beside it and chewed her cud. Soon she dozed off. Dreamt she was a mighty queen defending her castle from mice.

Suddenly, mice squeaked. Bertha jumped. Instead, she leaned right onto the tree. The branches scratched her fluffy ears. Awakened, she snarled.

The next morning Bertha ate her nuts quietly. She felt stronger. Later, she saw a shimmering pond. Hoping for swimming fun, she ran towards it. Bounced off a rock! Bertha landed with a thud. But she wasn’t hurt.

Luked down. Saw a small school of fish. Swim closer
